vocab.meaning: tinh thần/xu hướng văn hóa của thời đại
vocab.example: Competitive basketball has firmly entered the cultural zeitgeist, especially among the urban youth in my country.

vocab.meaning: lòng trung thành kiên định/không lay chuyển
vocab.example: Fans often exhibit unwavering loyalty to their local clubs, supporting them through thick and thin.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó/sự gắn kết
vocab.example: Participating in team sports provides individuals with a sense of belonging that is vital for mental well-being.

vocab.meaning: sự hiệp lực (sức mạnh tổng hợp)
vocab.example: In volleyball, the synergy between the setter and the attacker is what truly captivates the audience.

vocab.meaning: bình đẳng (không phân biệt giai cấp/địa vị)
vocab.example: Street football is remarkably egalitarian; all you need is a ball and a bit of space, regardless of your background.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua rào cản kinh tế - xã hội
vocab.example: The passion for the national team is a rare force that can transcend socio-economic barriers and unite the rich and poor.

vocab.meaning: một cột mốc/nghi thức trưởng thành
vocab.example: For many young boys in rural villages, joining the local wrestling team is seen as a rite of passage.
The heavy commercialization of professional leagues has turned team sports into a multi-billion dollar industry here.

vocab.meaning: các giải đấu mang tính chất giải trí/phong trào
vocab.example: Even for office workers, joining recreational leagues on weekends is a popular way to stay fit and socialize.

vocab.meaning: câu chuyện về kẻ yếu thế (vượt khó vươn lên)
vocab.example: Our culture loves a good underdog story, where a small-town team defies the odds to win a national title.
